purpose: Retain a public local rainfall statistic near the representative CHT/Yangmingshan endpoint and map it to a conservative demo rain-rate preset without upgrading it to measured-for-link weather or RF evidence.

retrieval.sourceFamily: Taiwan Central Weather Administration station observations

parser.sourceField: headers="rain" table cell; CWA label is daily accumulated rainfall in millimeters
parser.yearInference: The CWA 24hr table omits the year; 2026 is inferred from the 2026-06-13 retrieval date.
parser.incrementMethod: Rows were sorted ascending by observation time. For adjacent daily-accumulation readings, non-decreasing values use current minus previous; when the accumulation drops, the current value is treated as the first post-reset accumulation. This avoids treating the midnight reset as a storm increment.
parser.rainRateMapping: Peak 10-minute increment is multiplied by 6 to express an hourly equivalent, then rounded to the viewer slider's 5 mm/h step and capped to the 0-100 mm/h UI range.

stations.candidateUse: Nearby Yangmingshan-area station observation source for the representative CHT endpoint.

stations.stationName: Yangmingshan (CWA endpoint); repair register previously labeled this ID as a Zhuzihu candidate
stations.candidateUse: Nearby Yangmingshan-area station observation source for the representative CHT endpoint.

demoMapping.selectionRule: Use the maximum station-level demoRainRatePresetMmPerHour among the retained nearby CWA samples.
demoMapping.uiMeaning: A light-rain local public statistic preset for exercising the rain attenuation slider. The clear-sky selected-pair report still uses rainRateMmPerHour=0 unless the user moves the slider or opens a report URL carrying rainRateMmPerHour=5.
demoMapping.disclosureLabel: public local rain statistic mapped to a scenario input

citation.text: Taiwan Central Weather Administration station observations, Anpu station 46691 and Yangmingshan station 46693, 24-hour observation HTML accessed 2026-06-13.

supports: retained public local rainfall statistic near the representative CHT/Yangmingshan endpoint
a conservative 5 mm/h demo rain-rate preset derived from public CWA station observations
separating the standards-derived rain attenuation model from its scenario rain input
doesNotSupport: measured weather for the CHT-SANSA link
long-term R0.01 rain-rate calibration under ITU-R P.837/P.618 availability workflow
packet, RF, active route, or acceptance claims
